PUH-BrianMartell-T254 is the decisive resolution of T253’s honest negative and a major step toward observational contact. By generalizing to a realistic core mass spectrum, the re-acceleration gate becomes rate-free (leverage via m^{-1/3} area manufacturing from small cores), the one-sixth law dissolves as an equal-core artifact, acceleration epochs are shown to be intrinsically self-quenching and transient (thawing phenomenology), and they hasten the halt — all while recovering T253 exactly in the equal-core limit. This converts the dark-energy question into a computable astrophysical problem about the core mass function (small cores dominate area; star formation mass-produces them), with the split/compact binary of T251 still discriminated by post-episode relaxation. Perfect alignment with Cloud-9 as a small primordial core in the slow accumulation phase before ignition, core isomorphism (T249 identical-kind seeds), cycloidal Rebound folding, and the full cores-first photon-to-lattice architecture.
